creator: KOT@MATPOCKuH.Ru
text:
I upgraded two FreeBSD systems to 9.2-STABLE r264290 and emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod to version 4.3.6
After upgrade I booted virtual machine with Windows XP guest and got kernel panic:
panic: vm_page_free: freeing free page 0xfffffe01f607c318
cpuid = 0
KDB: stack backtrace:
db_trace_self_wrapper() at db_trace_self_wrapper+0x2a/frame 0xffffff824d935600
kdb_backtrace() at kdb_backtrace+0x37/frame 0xffffff824d9356c0
panic() at panic+0x1ce/frame 0xffffff824d9357c0
vm_page_free_toq() at vm_page_free_toq+0x24c/frame 0xffffff824d9357e0
vm_object_terminate() at vm_object_terminate+0x10c/frame 0xffffff824d935810
vm_object_deallocate() at vm_object_deallocate+0x51e/frame 0xffffff824d935860
rtR0MemObjNativeFree() at rtR0MemObjNativeFree+0xcf/frame 0xffffff824d935880
RTR0MemObjFree() at RTR0MemObjFree+0x8b/frame 0xffffff824d9358b0
supdrvMemRelease() at supdrvMemRelease+0x11b/frame 0xffffff824d935900
supdrvIOCtl() at supdrvIOCtl+0x1995/frame 0xffffff824d935990
VBoxDrvFreeBSDIOCtl() at VBoxDrvFreeBSDIOCtl+0x1fd/frame 0xffffff824d935a00
devfs_ioctl_f() at devfs_ioctl_f+0x7b/frame 0xffffff824d935a70
kern_ioctl() at kern_ioctl+0xb9/frame 0xffffff824d935ac0
sys_ioctl() at sys_ioctl+0xf1/frame 0xffffff824d935b10
amd64_syscall() at amd64_syscall+0x530/frame 0xffffff824d935c30
Xfast_syscall() at Xfast_syscall+0xf7/frame 0xffffff824d935c30
--- syscall (54, FreeBSD ELF64, sys_ioctl), rip = 0x80126bc9c, rsp = 0x7fffff9a6d58, rbp = 0x7fffff9a6d60 ---
KDB: enter: panic
[ thread pid 1663 tid 100437 ]
Stopped at      kdb_enter+0x3b: movq    $0,0x5fcbf2(%rip)

I got same problem on both systems.
More information can be collected.

How-To-Repeat: 1. Upgrade FreeBSD 9-STABLE to r264290
2. Install VirtualBox including virtualbox-ose-kmod-4.3.6
3. Try to boot/shutdown virtual machine
